name: data-provenance-pipeline
description: Extracts data source and provenance information from Elasticsearch based on validated taxonomy

parameters.name: sdk_container_image
parameters.label: Worker SDK Container Image
parameters.helpText: Container image URI used for the Python SDK harness on Dataflow workers. This must contain your packaged pipelines and dependencies.

parameters.name: experiments
parameters.label: Experiments
parameters.helpText: Comma-separated Dataflow experiments. For custom containers, Runner v2 is required. Use 'use_runner_v2' for batch.

parameters.name: index
parameters.label: Elasticsearch Index
parameters.helpText: Name of the index to query in Elasticsearch

parameters.name: min_batch_size
parameters.label: Beam minimum batch size
parameters.helpText: Controlling the size of the batches Beam produces. Default is 50. Set to 0 to disable batching.

parameters.name: max_batch_size
parameters.label: Beam maximum batch size
parameters.helpText: Controlling the size of the batches Beam produces. Default is 200. Set to 0 to disable batching.

parameters.name: taxonomy_path
parameters.label: Validated Taxonomy Path
parameters.helpText: Path to validated taxonomy JSONL file

parameters.name: output
parameters.label: Output File Prefix
parameters.helpText: GCS or local path prefix for output files

parameters.name: bq_table
parameters.label: BigQuery Table
parameters.helpText: Optional BigQuery table to write output (project:dataset.table)

parameters.name: bq_schema
parameters.label: BigQuery Schema Path
parameters.helpText: Optional GCS path to BigQuery schema JSON

parameters.name: temp_location
parameters.label: GCS Temp Location
parameters.helpText: GCS path for temporary files used in BigQuery I/O
